code:
%%{Infra_LoadBalancer}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (Infra_WorkerNode)

[Infra_RedisCache] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (Infra_RedisCache)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (Infra_EtcdCluster)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (Infra_RedisCache)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [Infra_WorkerNode]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [Infra_EtcdCluster] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个Hub Sync的状态图，核心是Infra_WorkerNode上的同步流程。起点应该是Infra_RedisCache触发OUT_OF_SYNC状态，当本地hub检测到与federation的数据分歧时——比如CRDT frame过期、缺少贡献数据或者网络拓扑变化。
明白，OUT_OF_SYNC是起始状态。那从OUT_OF_SYNC之后呢？是直接进入拉取远程数据，还是先有个触发动作？
需要BeginSync这个动作，进入FETCH_REMOTE状态。这时候要从federation peers拉取最新的CRDT vector clocks和state diffs，数据来源是Infra_EtcdCluster。我需要在FETCH_REMOTE右边加note说明这个过程。
好的，FETCH_REMOTE已经加上，note也补了。下一步是MERGE状态对吧？FrameDownloaded作为触发条件。
对，MERGE要执行CRDT merge function，确定性解决冲突。然后进入VALIDATE状态，这时候要跑schema检查、hash完整性验证，还要verify signatures from remote hubs。最后VALIDATE通过就到SYNCED，写回Infra_RedisCache，整个流程回到Infra_WorkerNode。
主流程都画好了：OUT_OF_SYNC → FETCH_REMOTE → MERGE → VALIDATE → SYNCED。不过异常路径怎么处理？比如网络超时或者验证失败的情况。
需要三条失败路径：FETCH_REMOTE可能因为NetworkTimeout或AuthError到FAILED；MERGE如果ConflictUnresolved也到FAILED；VALIDATE则是HashMismatch或SignatureInvalid。然后FAILED要有RetryScheduled到RETRY状态，再RetrySync回到OUT_OF_SYNC重新来。
异常路径加好了。还有别的场景吗？比如维护模式或者hub离线的情况？
对，需要维护相关的路径。SYNCED可以因为PeriodicSync或ParamChange回到OUT_OF_SYNC；另外OUT_OF_SYNC如果检测到HubOffline或LatencyHigh，要进入DEGRADED状态，然后EscalatedToOps到Infra_EtcdCluster。最后把所有核心状态用core样式高亮一下。
确认一下：OUT_OF_SYNC、FETCH_REMOTE、MERGE、VALIDATE、SYNCED、FAILED、RETRY、DEGRADED这八个状态都设为core样式，填充色#ff8b00。整个图标题是SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (Infra_WorkerNode)，对吗？
没错，就是这个结构。主流程、异常重试、维护降级三条线都齐了，可以定稿。
